notes: C++ template-instantiation compile error in pandas's perf branch (`perf/skew-kurt-omp-xsimd`). The author added `extern template ... accumulate_moments_simd::operator()<xsimd::neon64>(...)` at moments_simd.hpp:255 (and the matching definition at moments_inst_neon.cpp:14), but the primary template was declared with `xsimd::neon` (not `xsimd::neon64`) at moments_simd.hpp:182. clang++ rejects the explicit instantiation. 2 compile units fail with the same root cause. macOS-15 / arm64 / Python 3.12 / clang++ -std=c++20. Source URL: https://github.com/pandas-dev/pandas/actions/runs/25463397447/job/74710897960. Imported on 2026-05-06; raw.log normalized from `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` output. Note: split=v2/holdout puts holdout at 5/4 (slightly over-target); v2/stress remains empty for cases truly fitting that split's 'deliberately difficult' criteria.
